45052.name: The Rabbit Hole
45052.description: This chamber is lined with fur and grass and looks like a nice place for little rabbits to snooze

45056.name: Wooded Hill
45056.description: Trees abound on this little hill. It is more then a copse, and more than a stand, it might best be described as a hill with a bunch of trees on it.

45057.name: The Warren
45057.description: This is the most northern part of the warren. Small piles of rabbit droppings mark the territory. A small emergency hole sits near the trail.

45058.name: The Warren
45058.description: Scratched up earth lies in all directions. Piles of rabbit refuse are collected along a path that extends north and south. A few broken twigs lie strewn across the way.

45059.name: The Warren
45059.description: A small mound stands here. It looks as if it might be at the entrance to something.

45060.name: The Warren
45060.description: The smell of rabbit is powerful. Small patches of musk mark the territorial arguments of rival males. A few bits of grass are left in this area, but a trail seems to lead north and south.

45061.name: The Warren
45061.description: Rabbit tracks are spread all about. Tufts of fur and torn up bits of grass indicate a small path through the warren. A few pellets are scattered to the north and south.

45062.name: The Warren
45062.description: The most southern edge of the warren has the tell tale signs of marked territory. Rabbit droppings are scattered about in symbolic designs near the edges of the path.

45063.name: Tusker Turn
45063.description: Cloven hoof marks have scored the ground here. Tusk marks are scored deep into the bark of the trees that make this turn. Deep ruts are in evidence everywhere.

45064.name: The Boar Track
45064.description: Hundreds of hoof prints indicate the presence of a group of boars. The bark of the trees have bristle hairs stuck onto them. Half eaten roots lie about in profusion.

45065.name: The Boar Track
45065.description: The ground is uneven and rutted. Offal covers the way, and a strong odor emanates from the soil. A few mushrooms lie half consumed by a nearby tree trunk.

46090.name: Reference Library
46090.description: The musty odor of slowly decaying parchment overwhelms you within the council library. Hovering in the center of the room is a large writing board, framed by intricately carved ivory. Bookcases line the walls, each filled with volumes of unmarked tomes.

chests.name: Iron and wooden chest
contents: Council library.  Hovering in the center of the room is a large writing board
Framed by intricately carved ivory.  Bookcases line the walls

Reference Library
Volumes of unmarked tomes.
each filled with

45067.name: Boar Bend
45067.description: Huge ruts in the ground and prints show that a group of wild pigs have been here recently. Most of the vegetation is missing from around the base of the surrounding trees.

46092.name: Council Chambers
46092.description: You stand in a large chamber, an enormous conference table sits in the middle of the room. A large hole off to the side leads down into the black depths of the ground. A sturdy redwood staircase stands against the wall, leading up into a musty smelling room. A feeling of law and order overwhelms you, and increases as you get closer to the table.

chests.name: Iron and wooden chest

there appears no way up.  A heavy cold

45069.name: Forest Path
45069.description: The ground seems to be slightly muddy here and the aroma of decay is present.

45070.name: Forest Path
45070.description: A few bushes struggle vainly to reach an area that is not enshrouded by the tall, encompassing trees. The path looks well trodden by the forest dwellers.

45071.name: Forest Path
45071.description: The path swerves to the north around a large oak. It also continues to the west for a short ways.

45072.name: Forest Path
45072.description: Trees to the left, trees to the right, trees all about. The panoply of vegetation covers the sky from view.

46097.name: Entrance Hall
46097.description: You stand within a cavernous hall, peacefully lit by blue arcfire lamps mounted upon the circularly curving walls. Intricately ordered patterns of precisely cut marble are laid out beneath your feat. Through a gate of thin iron bars, a quiet forest clearing can be seen. A soft blue aura surrounds the gate, no doubt indicating the presence of the magic which obscures ones view of this place from without.

chests.name: Iron and wooden chest

peacefully lit by blue arcfire lamps

45073.name: Forest Path
45073.description: Oaks and maples mingle here deep within the forest of Jharet, the mix occasionally including white birch which interrupts the natural gloom here. Faint wolven markings upon the ground are visible.

46099.name: Forest Path
46099.description: A snarl of overhanging branches line this not-oft-tread path through Jharet, approaching a hedged clearing to the north. A solemn, quiet hum reverberates through this section of the forest, casting a mood of tranquil foreboding upon you as you travel through.

chests.name: Iron and wooden chest
contents: Approaching a hedged clearing to the north.  A solemn
Forest Path
Snarl of overhanging branches line this not-oft-tread path through Jharet

casting a mood of tranquil foreboding upon
quiet hum reverberates

45074.name: Forest Path
45074.description: Trees line the small path that runs through the forest. Leaves cover the ground in small patches and moss covers the base of many of the older trees.

45075.name: Forest Path
45075.description: Roots make the path difficult to navigate here. They seem to reach up and gather all the loose debris about them.

45076.name: Forest Path
45076.description: Here along the path through Jharet, a great root reaches its fingers up into the air, its gnarled surface eerily alive, then arches and dives back into the fertile forest soil.

45077.name: Forest Path
45077.description: Acorns are spread along the path and show evidence of animal movement.

45078.name: Forest Path
45078.description: Thick growth along the path makes all movement off it impossible. A few great limbs hang over the path and seem to cradle the sky.

45079.name: Forest Path
45079.description: Trees and more trees. The forest is impenetrable except along the narrow path that leads north and south. Acorns from the surrounding trees lay strewn across the overgrown footpath.

45080.name: Forest Path
45080.description: There seems to be a break in the forest, and a small path runs to the east. The path also continues to the south and north amongst the trees.

45081.name: Forest Path
45081.description: The forest looks different here. The growth is extreme, and a presence exudes from the trees. The path runs east and west. The sound of water can be heard from deep within the woods.

45082.name: Forest Path
45082.description: The trees are dark and foreboding. Their bark is smooth and seem to have some indescribable quality.

45083.name: Forest Path
45083.description: There are no sounds here, only eerie silence. The trees seem to suck up all noise. The trees almost leer down at the path with disgust.

45084.name: Forest Path
45084.description: A terrible silence screams out to the forest. No animals make noise here, enormous knot at the base of a colossal tree.

45085.name: Forest Path
45085.description: Great trees line the path that runs along the forest floor. Leaves are scattered on the forest floor and tiny creatures snack on the decaying matter. A small, almost hidden path leads south.

45086.name: Forest Path
45086.description: A small tree leans out into the path trying to gather any sunlight or water it can. A nest is nestled in a bough near its trunk.

45087.name: Forest Path
45087.description: The trail leads only north and east. An enormous tree stands here blocking the way west.

45088.name: Forest Path
45088.description: The path extends among the trees to the north and to the south. A slight breeze wafts among the trees.

45089.name: Forest Path
45089.description: The path winds north and south. However, travel to the other directions is

45091.name: Finwald Forester`s Cabin
45091.description: This is definitely the cabin of a forester. Axes of all sizes hang from the walls along with many different hunting implements. The head of a great stag deer is mounted above a meager fire place. The skull of a bear sits with mouth agape on the mantle.

45090.name: Forest Path
45090.description: Many branches reach down and interlock in a graceful design. To the east, you see a small cabin.

45093.name: Conifer Curve
45093.description: One large pine tree stands here with branches spread. The dense needles make the path veer to the west and stop travel to the north. The path continues to the south.

45092.name: Forest Path
45092.description: A copse of trees almost obscure the small path that leads through the forest.

45094.name: Leafy Path
45094.description: Branches and twigs strewn upon the ground add to the cacophony of forest noise. A large crow sits aloft the branch of an old oak to the side of the path.

45096.name: Forest Path
45096.description: The path opens up here. The trees have thinned and to the south there looks to be a small rise.

45095.name: Leafy Path
45095.description: The trees that surround the path are entwined in an arch-like embrace that gives the underlying way a cozy feeling. Small trails of ants march along the perimeter of the path. A slight breeze passes along chilling the air.

45098.name: Rathwynna's Garden Path
45098.description: This path runs through a well manicured garden that is surrounded by a low stone wall. Vines and trellis supports run the entire length of the garden. Small patches of herbs and wild flowers look as if they have been carefully tended. A graceful willow tree stands here, its trailing branches swaying gently.

45097.name: Rathwynna's Hillock
45097.description: This small hill gives a good view of the path as it leads north. To the west, there is a small house with a garden that looks ancient. The garden, however, is well tended and a small, stone wall surrounds it.

45099.name: Rathwynna's House
45099.description: The house is one continuous room with only a large table as a separation between the meager hearth and the well stocked kitchen. A huge pot suspended in the fire place bubbles fervently, and a number of pans and cooking utensils hang from a rack over a cutting board.

45051.name: The Wooded Grotto
45051.description: Small rock slides crackle down from the almost vertical walls that line the narrow grotto. Trees fight tenaciously for a foothold in the rocky surface. A cool breeze drifts by.

46093.name: Inquisitorum
46093.description: A web of silk covers the curving surfaces of this circular chamber within the arbiters council hall, where a biting chill seeps into your marrow, permeating everything present here. Through the web you can see a faded mural upon the rear wall depicting a winged halfbreed, one hand closed about a rope of tangled knots, the other open, a small pixie bursting forth from it. A railing of engraved pewter follows the walls, and three small wooden stools rest in the center of the inquisitorum. The only exit is through a small door of pine to the east.

45066.name: The Boar Track
45066.description: Hoof prints and piles of porcine patties are here in profusion. The smell of urine permeates the air. Small snuffling noises echo through the air.

45068.name: The Boar Pit
45068.description: A large, reeking pit of mud sits here. There seems to be room for a good romp if you desire. Bits of refuse litter the edges of the area, but the pit itself has only pure mud in it. A cluster of mushrooms glows with an eerie red light, pulsing faintly.

45000.name: In The Forest
45000.description: Tall trees loom over your head as the canopy of the forest attempts to climb to the sun. Small birds and playful squirrels cavort through the upper parts of these imperious trees.

chests.name: Iron and wooden chest
contents: In The Forest
Nervous little rabbit forages amongst the underbrush.
Of these imperious trees.
Tall trees loom over your head as the canopy of the forest attempts to climb
To the sun.  Small birds and playful squirrels cavort through the upper parts

45001.name: In The Forest
45001.description: A blending of oak and pine make this bit of forest a vibrant green with a myriad of tree shapes and sizes. Birds chirp merrily amongst the sheltering branches. A graceful willow tree stands here, its trailing branches swaying gently.

chests.name: Iron and wooden chest
contents: Blending of oak and pine make this bit of forest a vibrant green with a
Branches.
In The Forest
Myriad of tree shapes and sizes.  Birds chirp merrily amongst the sheltering

45002.name: In The Forest
45002.description: Oak and pine trees blend together in harmonious union with their branches combining to make a ceiling of green.

chests.name: Iron and wooden chest
contents: Combining to make a ceiling of green.  A multitude of forest dwelling animals
Crowd among the leaves.
In The Forest
Oak and pine trees blend together in harmonious union with their branches

45003.name: The Split Path
45003.description: The trees seem to part here and a small path, that seems more like an animals track, heads off both north and south. There is abundant animal life all about the edges of this small trail, but the way east is blocked by dense, seemingly impassable growth.

chests.name: Iron and wooden chest
contents: All about the edges of this small trail
Animals track
Brigand looks at you and counts the odds.
Firefly glows with a greenish light.
Nervous little rabbit forages amongst the underbrush.
Seemingly impassable growth.

heads off both north and south.  There is abundant animal life
that seems more like an

45004.name: Inside the Pavilion
45004.description: Inside is a large, sumptuous tent filled with gaily woven rugs and soft animal skins. A simple wooden table groans with the weight of a wondrous feast.

45005.name: Small Clearing
45005.description: A mouldering skeleton lies pinned to a tree with an arrow through its ribcage. Tatters of cloth wave slowly in the breeze, and the sound of locusts fills the air with a rich hum. A butterfly alights on the skull, completing the mood of peaceful serenity here.

45007.name: Leafy Path
45007.description: Small trees fight for growth underneath the green canopy above. A few branches lie strewn about, and the moss and lichens are making a slow lunch of a fallen tree on the side of the way.

chests.name: Iron and wooden chest
contents: Branches lie strewn about

and the moss and lichens are making a slow lunch of

45008.name: The Sharp Turn
45008.description: A sudden turn in the path makes travel difficult here. To the north, the path seems to be traversable, but to the east, the way seems less clear. A large tree bars your way south and west.

chests.name: Iron and wooden chest
contents: Gnarled branch lies here.
Large tree bars your way south and west.

but to the east
the
the way seems less clear.  A

45009.name: Forest Path
45009.description: Dark conifers line the edges of the path and needles make the ground a soft bed of decaying vegetation. Fungus and lichens cover the base of the trees and provide a varied surface on which countless insects make their abodes.

chests.name: Iron and wooden chest
contents: Bed of decaying vegetation.  Fungus and lichens cover the base of the trees and

Forest Path
Provide a varied surface on which countless insects make their abodes.

45010.name: Forest Path
45010.description: The darkness to the south and east indicate an impenetrable mass of trees. To the north and west, however, the path continues under the outspread limbs of the knotted pines.

chests.name: Iron and wooden chest
contents: Darkness to the south and east indicate an impenetrable mass of trees.

45011.name: Forest Path
45011.description: The dark, green cool settles down from the branches overhead. A multitude of interlaced branches make an impenetrable wall along the edges of the path, which splits here to venture east, south, and westward through the ancient forest of Jharet. A graceful willow tree stands here, its trailing branches swaying gently.

chests.name: Iron and wooden chest

Forest Path

south

45012.name: Forest Path
45012.description: Large trees loom above and create a ceiling of green. The forbidding, dense foliage seems impenetrable and it imparts an ethereal sense of stillness to Jharet. Worn footpaths meander through the ancient woods, which seem to go on endlessly.

which seem to go on

45013.name: Forest Path
45013.description: The smell of growth and decay permeate the air with a scent as deep as the forest itself. Branches creak and groan as the wind shifts them slowly against each other. The path leads north and east with a small clearing to the south.

chests.name: Iron and wooden chest

45014.name: Forest Path
45014.description: The forest almost seems alive as the trees combine together in an almost imperceptible sway. Occasional birds burst forth into the air and flutter from one tree to another.

chests.name: Iron and wooden chest
contents: Forest Path

46091.name: Interrogation Room
46091.description: You stand in a pure white room, the walls are white, floor and ceiling are white. The only non-white thing is the cold metal door on the south wall. There is nothing to distract you, not even the fact that the walls are white, as a bright light shines in your face; nearly blinding you.

chests.name: Iron and wooden chest

45017.name: Lupine Corner
45017.description: The markings of a wolf clan along the base of the trees, and the tell tale scent of male wolf musk, make this turn in the path a sign to all travelers to beware.

chests.name: Iron and wooden chest
contents: Beware.

45018.name: Wolf Hollow
45018.description: A small hollow, lined with trees, shows the markings of a wolf clan. Trees that have spray stains and torn up moss indicate the possibility of wolves in this part of the forest.

chests.name: Iron and wooden chest

45019.name: Wolf Hollow
45019.description: The path runs through the bottom of a small hollow that has all the indications of wolves. Spoor and spray are scattered throughout the fringes of the trail.

chests.name: Iron and wooden chest
contents: Gnarled branch lies here.

Trail.
Wolf Hollow

45020.name: Wolf Hollow
45020.description: Numerous wolf tracks run along the side of the path. A series of skeletal remains are faintly visible in the underbrush at the base of the trees.

chests.name: Iron and wooden chest
contents: Black and white wolf crouches in a predatory stance.

45021.name: Wolf Hollow
45021.description: The path widens here slightly as the hollow begins to become more pronounced. To the east, the path dead ends, and only the north and west are

45022.name: Wolf Hollow
45022.description: The hollow seems to have hit an impassable barrier of trees. However, there is a hole in the ground that looks like a den of some sort.

chests.name: Iron and wooden chest
contents: Hollow seems to have hit an impassable barrier of trees.  However
Is a hole in the ground that looks like a den of some sort.
Wolf Hollow
You are very thirsty and should find something to drink.
there

45023.name: The Wolf Den
45023.description: The earthen walls of the den have fresh claw marks that tell of recent excavation. The overpowering scents and markings here make it clear that this is a lupine home. A tangle of pale vines spreads across the forest floor, their roots exposed.

chests.name: Iron and wooden chest

Spotted deer skips through the woods.

Wolf Den

45024.name: Behind the Den
45024.description: Small bone fragments lie in profusion about the rear entrance to what is some sort of den. Scent markers made of piled spoor and spray are spattered upon the outer edges, but not on the clean area directly in front. It looks to be the home of wolves.

chests.name: Iron and wooden chest
contents: Be the home of wolves.

45025.name: Ancient Woods
45025.description: The trees that stand here are scored with the battles of centuries. Bark filled with innumerable notches and scratches give character to the dark denizens. A strange gloom seems to hang over the small trail through these woods.

chests.name: Iron and wooden chest
contents: Ancient Woods

Woods.

45026.name: Ancient Woods
45026.description: Gloom fills the air as the dark bark of the time-worn pines absorb almost all light. Patches of earth scent the air with the aroma of decay.

chests.name: Iron and wooden chest
contents: All light.  Patches of earth scent the air with the aroma of decay.
Ancient Woods
Gloom fills the air as the dark bark of the time-worn pines absorb almost
Wolf arrives in from the south.

45027.name: Ancient Woods
45027.description: Huge branches interlock in an embrace spanning centuries as the trees seem to lean over in a dark hug. Pine cones and needles are strewn about the forest floor.

chests.name: Iron and wooden chest
contents: Ancient Woods
Floor.
Huge branches interlock in an embrace spanning centuries as the trees seem
To lean over in a dark hug.  Pine cones and needles are strewn about the forest

45028.name: Ancient Woods
45028.description: Muffled sounds echo from the hanging limbs of the aged trees. A dullness seems to sit in the air as a palpable presence, sapping your energy. Tangled branches mingle overhead, dripping sap and moisture down upon the forest floor below.

chests.name: Iron and wooden chest
contents: Ancient Woods
Below.

dripping sap and moisture down upon the forest floor
sapping your energy.  Tangled

45029.name: Ancient Woods
45029.description: Occasional snaps and cracks are the only noise in the gloom of the oppressive atmosphere in these woods. The ground seems always shrouded in darkness.

chests.name: Iron and wooden chest
contents: Ancient Woods
Darkness.

Patch of fungus eminates a red glow.

45030.name: Ancient Woods
45030.description: Overhanging branches create a cover which catches all light. Thus the ground is shrouded in perpetual gloom. Only the chirp of a lost bird adds any life to this wood.

chests.name: Iron and wooden chest
contents: Ancient Woods
Ground is shrouded in perpetual gloom.  Only the chirp of a lost bird adds any

Overhanging branches create a cover which catches all light.  Thus the

45031.name: Ancient Woods
45031.description: To the west there seems to be a break in the constant gloom of these ancient woods. To the east, the woods seem to end in the cover of leafy darkness.

45032.name: Bear Bend
45032.description: Huge gashes in the bark of a nearby tree indicate bear country. Similar marks are spread all along the trail as it turns north. To the east, the woods seem dark and foreboding.

45033.name: Before The Cave
45033.description: A large, barren piece of ground is covered with the refuse created by a large carnivore. Thigh bones of some large animal sit half-eaten with the marrow sucked out. Smashed ribs are scattered about. To the west, a large cave looms out of the side of a hill.

45034.name: Bear Cave
45034.description: The cave is huge. Stalagmites and stalactites are spread about the interior. One small area is matted with bark and pine needles and appears to be the resting place of the inhabitant. A tangle of pale vines spreads across the forest floor, their roots exposed.

45035.name: Claw Mark Clearing
45035.description: A large bear has made its mark here. Most of the trees surrounding this clearing have the signs of a large bear's markings. Spoor and hair mark the base of many trees also. A tangle of pale vines spreads across the forest floor, their roots exposed.

46095.name: Large Chamber
46095.description: The large circular cavern you now stand in, is practically ablaze with blue arcfire. A large hole in the ceiling looks to be a passage way of some sort, however, there appears no way up. A heavy cold, solid metal door stands in front of you.

46094.name: Pool of Acid
46094.description: As you step into the room, you suddenly realize: there's no floor! As you start to fall you realize you really shouldn't break the rules and PK, it's not very nice. You think all about this, and have the time too, as your body and vital organs are being slowly eaten away by the powerful acid you're swimming in.

46096.name: Stone Corridor
46096.description: The marble tiling continues into this part of the cavern. Two doors on either side of the stone hallway both simply emanate pain. The door frames made of solid black steel, gruesome carvings of death adorn them and warnings in blood beg you not to enter. The corridor widens into a large chamber to the north, and brightens up as the arcfire increases.

45043.name: The Sloping Trail
45043.description: The trail sits on the side of steep hill. It descends to the west and terminates here to the east. To the south, the forest continues, while a small path winds its way north.

45044.name: The Sloping Trail
45044.description: To the east, the trail ascends, and to the west, it descends. The footing is treacherous here and one misstep might send an unwary traveler sprawling.

45045.name: The Sloping Trail
45045.description: The slope gently tapers to the west in what appears to be a small, wooded grotto. To the east, the slope ascends over a treacherous trail through the northern Lowode.

45047.name: Quiet Glade
45047.description: A brightly striped pavilion sits beside a moss-covered well. The well looks ancient and crumbled, but the water level is quite high. You can hear the buzz of insects and the trickle of water to the south.

45048.name: The Wooded Grotto
45048.description: A small path runs along a stream bed. Gnarled roots poke out on either side, and the trickle of water fills the silence with laughter. A glade sits to the north, within which you can see a bright pavilion.

46098.name: Hedged Clearing
46098.description: Two rows of high, well-kept hedges curve here, encompassing a small clearing within this portion of Jharet. Where the hedges meet, a thin stone archway contains a gate of solid iron bars. A preternatural calm dominates the clearing, further raising your curiosity. The gate would appear to lead nowhere but further into the forest, as beyond it can be seen the familiar tangle of root and bush.

45053.name: The Sloping Trail
45053.description: The trail ends to the east in the bottom of a narrow grotto lined with trees. It ascends to the north up a narrow ledge and descends south down a graveled trail.

45054.name: The Sloping Trail
45054.description: To the south, the trail begins a steep ascent and to the west it reaches a hill. Rocks interspersed with decaying vegetation make this a hazardous path to take.

45055.name: Wooded Hill
45055.description: This hill is covered with a myriad of different trees. Elm, oak, aspen, and a judicious sprinkling of conifers round out the assortment.
